title: Hieracium plauense
taxonomy: Hieracium plauense is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It belongs to the genus Hieracium, which comprises a large number of species commonly known as hawkweeds. The specific classification of Hieracium plauense is further detailed as being part of the subgenus Hieracium. This subgenus is comprised of several species, including Hieracium plauense, which is native to Europe. The classification of Hieracium plauense is also supported by its physical characteristics and growth habits.
